description: Tab list for switching between Standard and Access Sheffield entry requirement panels on undergraduate course pages.

stories.name: AccessSheffieldActive
stories.description: Access Sheffield tab shown as active

notes: Both tab labels ('Standard offer' and 'Access Sheffield offer'), IDs (js-course-ereq-tab--standard, js-course-ereq-tab--access_sheffield), and aria-controls values (js-course-ereq-panel--standard, js-course-ereq-panel--access_sheffield) are always the same across all pages — hardcode them. The js-course-ereq-tabslist class is a JavaScript hook and should be included verbatim. This component is always used alongside CourseEreqPanel which contains the tab panels.
